ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study type */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the study was published */,
  "reference_no" TEXT /* Reference number of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., recruiting, active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_study_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_type_id") REFERENCES study_types ("study_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_types" (
  "study_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study type */,
  "study_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the study type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_sites" (
  "study_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study site */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the study site */,
  "site_address" TEXT /* Address of the study site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the patient belongs to */,
  "selected_population_id" INTEGER /* ID of the selected population the patient belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "jak2_mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the JAK2 mutation status of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_selected_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("selected_population_id") REFERENCES selected_populations ("selected_population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_jak2_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("jak2_mutation_id") REFERENCES jak2_mutations ("jak2_mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "selected_populations" (
  "selected_population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selected population */,
  "selected_population_name" TEXT /* Name of the selected population */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the selected population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selected_population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jak2_mutations" (
  "jak2_mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each JAK2 mutation */,
  "jak2_mutation_name" TEXT /* Name of the JAK2 mutation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the JAK2 mutation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jak2_mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_treatments" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment started */,
  "treatment_end_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment ended */,
  "dose" TEXT /* Dose of the treatment */,
  "dosage_form" TEXT /* Dosage form of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id", "treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date the outcome occurred */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of the outcome */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Status of the study (e.g., recruiting, active, completed)
Unique identifier for each study type
Unique identifier for each study site
ID of the study the patient belongs to
ID of the selected population the patient belongs to
ID of the JAK2 mutation status of the patient

Unique identifier for each access event
